news.paragraph: SMH futures are down as oil prices surge, with Nvidia showing weakness and Walmart falling. The options market is also flashing a warning sign ahead of Nvidia's earnings, suggesting potential volatility in the semiconductor sector. Traders should monitor these cross-asset movements and the upcoming Nvidia event as key catalysts.

headlines.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall As Oil Prices Top $100; Nvidia Wavers, Walmart Falls, SpaceX Files For Huge IPO
The options market is flashing an ominous sign about Nvidia’s looming earnings
